review_text: The acceleration is incredible and handling is precise. Best car I've ever owned!
Fuel economy is disappointing for a hybrid. Interior feels cheap.
Great safety features and comfortable seats for long drives.
The infotainment system is slow and crashes frequently.
Excellent value for money. Maintenance costs are lower than expected.
Engine noise is loud at highway speeds, but overall a reliable car.
Love the design and technology package. Apple CarPlay works perfectly.
Back seats are cramped. Not suitable for tall passengers.
Smooth ride and great fuel efficiency. Perfect for city driving.
Dealership service was poor, but the car itself is decent.
